name: Executioner's Calling

passives.name: Grievous Wounds
passives.effects: Dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemy champions inflicts them with {{tip|Grievous Wounds}} for 3 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Dealing {{as physical damage}} to enemy champions inflicts them with {{tip Grievous Wounds}} for 3 seconds.

simpleDescription: Overcomes enemies with high health gain

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution-semantics review: any physical-damage event against enemy champions applies Grievous Wounds for 3 seconds.
Player-visible behavior: the healing-reduction debuff is applied on qualifying champion-damage events even when a shield absorbs the damage instance.
